headline: KNOW THE INSPECTION YOU FACE
subheading: A senior QP guide to every MHRA inspection type and how to be ready for each.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial background evoking MHRA pharmaceutical inspection readiness, abstract and conceptual. A deep navy base dissolves into a glowing teal and cyan glass-walled cleanroom corridor receding into soft focus, suggesting a site about to be scrutinised. Floating in mid-air, a set of translucent layered glass panels fan out like distinct inspection pathways branching from a single point, each panel etched with abstract checklist grids, audit-trail line patterns and subtle risk-rating bar shapes glowing faintly cyan. A poised magnifying lens of clear glass hovers over one panel, casting a focused circle of brighter light to imply targeted scrutiny and a thread being followed. A single fresh-green accent line traces through the composition like a verified, closed-out path. Immaculate reflective surfaces, soft volumetric daylight, shallow depth of field, premium and sterile yet warm, conceptual metaphor of branching inspection types and demonstrable readiness, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
